title: ballota saxatilis
intro: Ballota saxatilis, also known as Spanish lavender or mountain mint, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, thanks to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Ballota saxatilis include relief from nausea, indigestion, and bronchitis, as well as its ability to calm the nervous system and promote a restful sleep. The plant can be consumed as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its essential oil can be used topically or added to aromatherapy blends for its calming and soothing effects.
